---
description: "Use when generating or editing Python code for adaptive agents to include Korean comments and handle Korean inputs."
applyTo: "**/*.py"
---
# Korean Agent Instructions

When working with Python code in adaptive agent implementations:

- Include Korean comments for key functions and logic to support bilingual development.
- Ensure input handling supports Korean text (e.g., use UTF-8 encoding).
- Reference research from reference.md for robust, scalable code structures.

This ensures the agent can process tasks in both English and Korean effectively.
